post.summary: Retrieves carrier profile data, risk assessment, certdata. **Excludes** carrier packet data.

parameters.name: DOTNumber
parameters.description: DOT number of the carrier. For example: 12345

parameters.name: docketNumber
parameters.description: Docket number of the carrier. Example: MC12345

post.summary: Retrieves carrier profile data, risk assessment, certdata. **Includes** carrier packet data.

parameters.name: DOTNumber
parameters.description: DOT number of the carrier. Example: 12345

parameters.name: DocketNumber
parameters.description: Docket number of the carrier. Example: MC12345

post.summary: Retrieves a list of authorized and verified users for a carrier.

parameters.name: DOTNumber
parameters.description: DOT number of the carrier. For example: 12345

parameters.name: docketNumber
parameters.description: Docket number of the carrier. Example: MC12345

post.summary: Searches carrier contact sources within MCP/FMCSA for associated carriers.
post.description: This method searches for carriers associated with the given phone number or email address.

parameters.name: phone
parameters.description: The phone number to search for associated carriers.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: The email address to search for associated carriers.

post.summary: Retrieves incident report details for a given carrier.

parameters.name: DOTNumber
parameters.description: DOT number of the carrier.For example: 12345

parameters.name: docketNumber
parameters.description: Docket number of the carrier. Example: MC12345

post.summary: Retrieves Carrier VIN Verification status details.

parameters.name: DOTNumber
parameters.description: DOT number of the carrier.For example: 12345

parameters.name: docketNumber
parameters.description: Docket number of the carrier. Example: MC12345

post.summary: Retrieves a list of authorized and verified users for every carrier in the monitored list.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of carriers returned per page. The recommended and default value is 250. The max is 500.

post.summary: Pulls PDF documents so the TMS/customer can store them locally for their records.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the document. Example: company-agreement/12/f9f10ed2-799a-4521-a09b-19fb088e16c2

post.summary: Sends an email with a packet to the carrier based on set parameters.

parameters.name: carrierEmail
parameters.description: Email of the carrier. Example: abc@somedomain.com

parameters.name: dotNumber
parameters.description: DOT number of the carrier. Example: 12345

parameters.name: docketNumber
parameters.description: Docket number of the carrier. Example: MC12345

parameters.name: userName
parameters.description: Username of the customer. Optional parameter. Example: abc

parameters.name: sendConfirmationEmail
parameters.description: Indicates whether or not to send a confirmation email that the invitation was sent. Optional Parameter.

parameters.name: notificationEmails
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of additional emails to notify. Example: notify1@domain.com, notify2@domain.com

post.summary: Requests user verification (non-onboarding Intellivite).

parameters.name: userVerificationEmail
parameters.description: Email of the user. Example: abc@somedomain.com

parameters.name: dotNumber
parameters.description: DOT number of the carrier. Example: 12345

parameters.name: docketNumber
parameters.description: Docket number of the carrier. Example: MC12345

parameters.name: userName
parameters.description: Username of the customer. Optional parameter. Example: abc

post.summary: Requests Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) verification.
post.description: VIN validation requests are sent via text message only. Email VIN validations are no longer supported.

parameters.name: deliveryOption
parameters.description: Method for sending the request. Only PhoneNumber (2) is supported.Value/Type List: 1 = Email, 2 = PhoneNumber; Value Only List:

parameters.name: vinVerificationEmail
parameters.description: Not used. Email VIN validations are no longer supported.

parameters.name: vinVerificationPhoneNumber
parameters.description: Phone number to send the request to

parameters.name: dotNumber
parameters.description: DOT number of the carrier. Example: 12345

parameters.name: docketNumber
parameters.description: Docket number of the carrier. Example: MC12345

parameters.name: userName
parameters.description: Username of the customer. Optional parameter. Example: abc

parameters.name: outputVINVerificationRequestID
parameters.description: Output VIN Verification Request ID. Example: false

200.description: Returns either a plain text string containing a message when outputVINVerificationRequestID is false, or an object with 'VinVerificationRequestID' and 'Message' when outputVINVerificationRequestID is true.

post.summary: Displays carriers that have completed packets within a specified date range.
post.description: Common practice is to poll this API every 5-15 minutes.

post.summary: Monitors changes to carrier insurance, risk assessment, and other important details.
post.description:
Common practice is to poll this API every 5-15 minutes.

If pagination parameters are not supplied, all carrier changes are returned. Otherwise, the number of carrier changes returned is limited to the pageSize.
If paging is requested, the response header will contain an "X-Pagination" item containing the details of the paged response.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of carriers returned per page. The recommended and default value is 250. The max is 500.

post.summary: Adds a carrier to the monitoring list.
Removes a carrier from the monitoring list.
Blocks a carrier.
Unblocks a carrier.
Returns list of MyCarrierPortal Factoring Companies with their unique identifiers.
post.description: Retrieves updated factoring companies for a given date range.

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: Start date for the update period. For example: 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: End date for the update period. For example: 2024-01-01T23:59:59Z

post.summary: Returns carrier's risk assessment with provided DOT number and Docket number.

parameters.name: dotNumber
parameters.description: DOT number of the carrier. Example: 12345

parameters.name: docketNumber
parameters.description: Docket number of the carrier. Example: MC010203. Optional

post.summary: Returns all monitored carrier risk assessments in bulk. Includes paging.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Default: 250. If set to more than 500, or less than 1, the default value will be used.

post.summary: Provides a list of monitored carriers.
post.description:
If pagination parameters are not supplied, all monitored carriers are returned. Otherwise, the number of monitored carriers returned is limited to the pageSize.
If paging is requested, the response header will contain an "X-Pagination" item containing the details of the paged response.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of carriers returned per page. The recommended and default value is 2500. The max is 5000.

post.summary: Calls GetCarrierData for all carriers on the monitored list.
post.description: This is a paginated API call to be used for bulk sync.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of carriers returned per page. The recommended and default value is 250. The max is 500.

post.summary: Provides a list of blocked carriers.
post.description:
If pagination parameters are not supplied, all blocked carriers are returned. Otherwise, the number of blocked carriers returned is limited to the pageSize.
If paging is requested, the response header will contain an "X-Pagination" item containing the details of the paged response.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of carriers returned per page. The recommended and default value is 2500. The max is 5000.

Source.description: Value/Type List: 0 = Unknown, 1 = ThirdParty, 2 = MyCarrierPackets, 3 = FMCSAData; Value Only List:

EmailType.description: Value/Type List: 1 = McpEmail, 2 = CompanyEmail, 3 = FMCSAEmail; Value Only List:

AssociationType.description: Value/Type List: 1 = Company, 2 = Support, 3 = Claims, 4 = SafetyManager, 5 = DispatchService, 6 = Owner, 7 = AvailableLoads, 8 = AuthorizedUser, 9 = UserAuthorizationPending, 10 = UserAuthorizationDenied, 11 = UserAuthorizationFollowUp, 12 = VerifiedUser, 13 = UserVerificationPending, 14 = UserVerificationDenied, 15 = UserVerificationFollowUp, 16 = Driver, 17 = Dispatcher, 18 = MCRecord, 19 = DOTRecord; Value Only List:
